name: nus-teardown-cluely
description: Open-source invisible AI overlay — three separate inputs (screen, mic, system audio) into an LLM. A complete Cluely-style copilot for meetings and coding problems, replicated by Nūs // Teardown.
author: potlakai

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Nūs transcribes your microphone so it can help you in conversations.
extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Nūs does not use the camera.
extendInfo.NSAudioCaptureUsageDescription: Nūs captures system audio to transcribe the other participant in a call.
